baseParameters.Arg1: 'success but no BCA Livongo Lab Files' >

Arg1.value: @concat('#$FilePath#/landing; mv ', variables('InputFile'),' #$FilePath#/landing/processed; compress -f #$FilePath#/landing/processed/', variables('InputFile'), '; mv #$FilePath#/verified/BCA_LIVONGO_LAB_FORMATTED_LABFile.dat #$FilePath#/verified/processed/BCA_LIVONGO_LAB_FORMATTED_LABFile.dat.', variables('RunID'), '; compress -f #$FilePath#/verified/processed/BCA_LIVONGO_LAB_FORMATTED_LABFile.dat.', variables('RunID'), '; mv #$FilePath#/verified/', variables('ErrorFile'),' #$FilePath#/verified/processed/', variables('ErrorFile'),'.', variables('RunID'), '; compress -f #$FilePath#/verified/processed/', variables('ErrorFile'),'.', variables('RunID'), '; mv #$FilePath#/verified/', variables('RejectFile'),' #$FilePath#/verified/processed/', variables('RejectFile'),'.', variables('RunID'), '; compress -f #$FilePath#/verified/processed/', variables('RejectFile'),'.', variables('RunID'), ';mv #$FilePath#/landing/', variables('ControlFile'),' #$FilePath#/landing/processed/', variables('ControlFile'),'; compress -f #$FilePath#/landing/processed/', variables('ControlFile'), ';')

@concat('#$FilePath#/landing; mv ', variables('InputFile'),' #$FilePath#/landing/processed; compress -f #$FilePath#/landing/processed/', variables('InputFile'), '; mv #$FilePath#/verified/BCA_LIVONGO_LAB_FORMATTED_LABFile.dat #$FilePath#/verified/processed/BCA_LIVONGO_LAB_FORMATTED_LABFile.dat.', variables('RunID'), '; compress -f #$FilePath#/verified/processed/BCA_LIVONGO_LAB_FORMATTED_LABFile.dat.', variables('RunID'), '; mv #$FilePath#/verified/', variables('ErrorFile'),' #$FilePath#/verified/processed/', variables('ErrorFile'),'.', variables('RunID'), '; compress -f #$FilePath#/verified/processed/', variables('ErrorFile'),'.', variables('RunID'), '; mv #$FilePath#/verified/', variables('RejectFile'),' #$FilePath#/verified/processed/', variables('RejectFile'),'.', variables('RunID'), '; compress -f #$FilePath#/verified/processed/', variables('RejectFile'),'.', variables('RunID'), ';mv #$FilePath#/landing/', variables('ControlFile'),' #$FilePath#/landing/processed/', variables('ControlFile'),'; compress -f #$FilePath#/landing/processed/', variables('ControlFile'), ';')
